title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Lenovo India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Lenovo India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Lenovo India Capital India in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Lenovo India Capital India:
Lenovo India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenovo India Capital India!
